observations.summary: Reflection result selected curiosity_organ with policy exploratory and top_second_gap 0.0163.
Reflection result selected curiosity_organ with policy exploratory and top_second_gap 0.0163.

proposals.title: Stability Probe for Reflection Selection
proposals.goal: Check whether the selected reflection organ remains stable under small policy perturbations.
proposals.rationale: The current top_second_gap is 0.0163, below the stability threshold 0.03. A small gap means the selected organ may be sensitive to scoring weights.
proposals.expected_effect: Identify whether curiosity-biased selection is robust or only barely preferred.
proposed_actions: Generate nearby exploratory policies by changing novelty by -0.02, 0.00, and +0.02.
Run the reflection loop once per policy without creating memory proposals.
Save a JSON stability report for human review.
success_criteria: At least three policy variants are evaluated.
No files outside results/ and logs/ are modified by the benchmark.
A report shows whether selected_organ stays the same or changes.

proposals.title: Policy Diversity Repair
proposals.goal: Ensure reflection policies can produce meaningfully different selected organs.
proposals.rationale: A configurable policy system should be able to switch behavior. Current unique selected organs: []. selected_by_policy={}.
proposals.expected_effect: Make conservative, exploratory, balanced, and memory-focused modes easier to distinguish.
proposed_actions: Increase separation between novelty-focused and reuse-focused policies.
Check that at least two different selected organs appear.
success_criteria: At least two unique selected organs appear.
At least one conservative or balanced policy selects critic_organ.

proposals.title: Experiment Planner Self-Check
proposals.goal: Validate that SAGE can propose the next experiment without executing it.
proposals.rationale: v2.0.2 should introduce controlled autonomy: proposal generation without unsafe action execution.
proposals.expected_effect: Establish the first autonomous planning loop while preserving human approval.
proposed_actions: Do not run the proposed experiments automatically.
success_criteria: At least two proposals are generated.
Safety policy disables network, shell, deletion, memory approval, and git actions.
One selected proposal is recommended for human review.

final_note: SAGE generated next-experiment proposals but did not execute them. Human approval is required before any experiment is run.
